name: The Honey Jar
what_they_sell: Flavored honeys and honey-based pastries — chili crisp honey, lavender shortbread, seasonal honey cakes
current_order_method: DM to order, Venmo payment, SF pickup
drop_cadence: Bi-weekly drops, announced on stories 24 hours in advance
sample_post_caption: New drop Saturday. Chili crisp honey and a lavender shortbread box. Story goes up at 9am. DM to grab yours.

name: Maltese Cafe SF
what_they_sell: Pastizzi and Maltese pastries — ricotta-filled, mushy pea, seasonal rotating
current_order_method: DM to preorder for pickup, Google Form link in bio
notable_signals: Niche cuisine with no SF equivalent
sample_post_caption: Saturday pastizzi order form is live. Ricotta and mushy pea this week plus a seasonal special. Link in bio, pickup Outer Sunset.

name: Dumpling Sisters
what_they_sell: Handmade frozen dumplings — pork and chive, shrimp and mushroom, seasonal specials
current_order_method: Preorder via Instagram DM, pickup in Richmond District
drop_cadence: Monthly bulk drops, DM list gets early access
sample_post_caption: May drop is open to the early access list now. 50 packs of pork and chive plus a new shrimp and mushroom batch. DM to get on next month's list.

name: Noe Valley Noodles
what_they_sell: Fresh hand-pulled noodles and chili oil — takeaway meal kits, rotating regional styles
current_order_method: DM to order, Venmo payment, Noe Valley pickup
drop_cadence: Weekly Friday drops, sells out same day
sample_post_caption: Friday noodles are up. Dan dan meal kit and a new cumin lamb option. DM to order, Venmo to lock in. Pickup Noe Valley noon to 4.

name: Haight Street Buns
what_they_sell: Steamed and baked bao — char siu, taro, seasonal rotating fillings
drop_cadence: Weekend drops, text list gets 24hr notice
sample_post_caption: Weekend bao drop. Char siu and a new taro special. Text me to grab a pack before they go. 24hr notice to the list always.
